allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) paths=data.get\('paths',{}\) components=data.get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\) for name,schema in components.items\(\): props=schema.get\('properties',{}\) if props: print\(f'Schema: {name}'\) for p,v in props.items\(\): print\(f' {p}: {v}'\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'dnd' in k.lower\(\) or 'drag' in k.lower\(\) or 'sortable' in k.lower\(\)]")
